name: Sweet and Spicy Steaks
recipeIngredient: 4 boneless beef chuck top blade steaks, 1 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure your steaks are well trimmed from excess fat.
2. In a small bowl, combine the sauce ingredients; mix well. Set aside half of the sauce.
3. Place the beef steaks on the grid over medium-hot coals. Grill uncovered for 18 to 22 minutes for medium rare to medium doneness, turning occasionally and brushing both sides with the remaining sauce during the last 5 minutes of grilling.
4. Serve the steaks with the reserved sauce.
